decisions.what: Multiplied by 10^decimals before Math.floor in the rAF step, then divided back
decisions.why: Spec defines a 'decimals' prop used by the Uptime stat (value 99.9). Literal Math.floor(eased * end) would discard the decimal portion and make the prop meaningless.

decisions.what: Used toLocaleString with minimumFractionDigits/maximumFractionDigits set to decimals
decisions.why: Ensures intermediate and final values render with the configured precision (e.g. 99.9% rather than 99%).

decisions.what: Imported ScrollReveal and AnimatedCounter as named imports
decisions.why: ScrollReveal.tsx uses 'export function ScrollReveal'; AnimatedCounter is exposed the same way. Default-style imports would fail to resolve.

decisions.what: Omitted the unused 'useCallback' import mentioned in the spec
decisions.why: tsconfig.app.json sets noUnusedLocals: true; an unused import would break the strict build.

decisions.what: Added a className prop to AnimatedCounter
decisions.why: Stats.tsx applies 'text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold text-white' to the counter, which requires the rendered span to accept className.
